chat.panel.title: Ask about my work
chat.disclosure.intro: This runs a small AI model inside your browser to answer questions about my background and projects. Nothing is sent to a server.
chat.disclosure.line.download: First use downloads ~500MB of model weights, cached in your browser afterwards.
chat.disclosure.line.webgpu: Requires WebGPU (recent Chrome, Edge, or Firefox on desktop).
chat.disclosure.line.accuracy: Answers are drawn from a curated bio and may still be wrong. Prefer the résumé for facts.
chat.disclosure.line.voice: Optional voice mode adds ~800MB (WebGPU) or ~550MB (WebAssembly) and asks for microphone access.
chat.webgpuMissing: WebGPU isn't available in this browser. Try Chrome, Edge, or Firefox on desktop.
chat.seed: I can answer questions about Sujata's background, projects, and experience. Everything runs locally in your browser.
chat.refusal: I only answer questions about Sujata's background, work, and projects. Try asking about her experience at Optum, her research, or her Master's at Tampere.
